description_long: This is a two-story convenience store with a wood-textured exterior and a blue gabled roof. The front features a large, white sign with Japanese text above a red-and-white striped awning, which shades the entrance and a small display area. There are several windows, including a balcony with a decorative railing on the upper floor, and a small side entrance with a blue awning. The building sits on a rectangular concrete base, with a bench and a small cooler or vending machine visible on the sides. The overall design is compact, with a blend of traditional and modern elements, and the store appears to be situated in an urban or suburban setting.
description: A compact, two-story convenience store with a wood-textured facade, blue gabled roof, and a prominent striped awning over the entrance. Features include a large storefront sign, balcony, and side amenities like a bench and cooler.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the balcony with a decorative railing, large window, and a side awning.
description_view_1: Front view with a large Japanese sign, striped awning, main entrance, and display area.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the small side entrance with a blue awning, windows, and a bench.
description_view_3: Back view displaying a plain wooden wall, a door, and a bench, with minimal architectural features.
attribute_storefront_signage: Large, rectangular, white sign with Japanese text in bold, mounted above the entrance and awning; no visible illumination or logos.
attribute_display_windows: One medium-sized window above the awning, framed in white, transparent, with no visible advertisements or displays.
